title: Samsung Unpacked is tomorrow: a wider Z Fold 8, a second foldable, and maybe AI glasses
summary: Samsung has teased a new hinge it calls Flex Titanium, which reports link to a far less visible fold line, as The Gadgeteer details. Multiple reports say Samsung will ship two book-style foldables this year.
